name: FeelWorld S7 7" 12G-SDI/HDMI 2.0 Camera Field Monitor
description: Monitor your 4K HDR signals with clarity in the field with the S7 7" 12G-SDI/HDMI 2.0 Camera Field Monitor from Feelworld.

features.Key Features:: 7" 1920 x 1200 IPS LCD Monitor | HDMI 2.0 and 12G-SDI Input/Output | 1600 cd/m² Brightness, Touchscreen | Up to DCI 4K I/O, 10-Bit, HDR Support | Dual L-Series/NP-F Battery Plate | 1200:1 Contrast Ratio, 3D LUT Support | 160° Viewing Angle | HDMI/SDI Cross Conversion Support
